summary: The video discusses building secure AI pipelines in the AEC industry using the Model Context Protocol (MCP). It emphasizes the importance of data quality and illustrates the integration of AI, APIs, and MCP to create intelligent systems. A demonstration highlights how GitHub Copilot utilizes MCP for efficient AI-tool communication.
